archimate:Assessment.name: European Interoperability Reference Architecture
archimate:Assessment.documentation:
Definition: The European Interoperability Reference Architecture (EIRA) is a framework that promotes seamless integration between eGovernment systems across Europe.
Viewpoint: Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/EuropeanInteroperabilityReferenceArchitectureAssessment
ABB name: eira:EuropeanInteroperabilityReferenceArchitectureAssessment
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/EuropeanInteroperableReferenceArchitectureAssessment
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint
The European Interoperability Reference Architecture (EIRA) is a framework that promotes seamless integration between eGovernment systems across Europe.
